# matchSingle(_:)

**Instance Method**

Match the specified string against a string value (not an array).

## Declaration

```swift
func matchSingle(_ value: String) -> EntitlementsQuery
```

## Discussion

Strings are matched byte for byte (i.e. no unicode normalization occurs).
title: matchSingle(_:)
